name: orleans
description: Skills for Microsoft Orleans 10 development including the result pattern and the multiservice modular-monolith pattern.

interface.shortDescription: Microsoft Orleans skills — result pattern and modular-monolith multiservice
interface.longDescription: Use Orleans to access reusable skills for Microsoft Orleans 10 development, covering a concise version-tolerant result pattern for grain calls and a modular-monolith multiservice pattern for painless logical-to-physical service separation.
defaultPrompt: Use the Orleans plugin to help implement the result pattern or the modular-monolith multiservice pattern in Orleans 10.
